_comment: Allowlist for the GitHub<->HF-Space module-drift guard (a11oy). ignore_paths/ignore_extensions are excluded entirely (built SPA bundles, vendored + binary assets). accepted_divergences are KNOWN, pre-existing GitHub<->HF divergences recorded so the guard lands green; each is still printed as a warning every run. Remove an entry once the file is reconciled so any FUTURE re-divergence fails the job.

accepted_divergences.static/3d/holographic.html: ahead=github, pending Forge redeploy of PR #430 (D1 WebGPU-init-hang fix: default WebGL2 shell + ?webgpu=1 opt-in). Live HF Space still serves the pre-fix file. Remove this entry once the box redeploys main and the OIDs reconcile.
accepted_divergences.static/3d/szl3d/szl3d_boot.js: ahead=github, pending Forge redeploy of PR #430 (D1 WebGPU-init-hang fix: _withTimeout guard on requestAdapter/renderer.init). Live HF Space still serves the pre-fix file. Remove this entry once the box redeploys main and the OIDs reconcile.
accepted_divergences.static/3d/surfaces/pinn.js: ahead=github, pending Forge redeploy of PR #434 (D4 PINN surface: GLSL3 volumetric shader fix -- explicit uInvModel uniform replaces inverse(modelMatrix), which is not an auto-injected built-in for a raw GLSL3 ShaderMaterial and aborted mount()). Live HF Space still serves the pre-fix file. Remove this entry once the box redeploys main and the OIDs reconcile.
accepted_divergences.serve.py: ahead=github, pending Forge redeploy of PR #441 (dedicated /fabric surface route: additive @app.get('/fabric') serving pages/fabric.html). Live HF Space serve.py (blob 62f1532) is exactly the pre-#441 file; GitHub main (blob ac311f0) differs ONLY by that additive route. The 'ahead=huggingface?' date label is a false read -- GitHub's per-file commit-date lookup was rate-limited (returned None), so the date heuristic defaulted toward HF; the content delta is unambiguously GitHub-ahead by the #441 /fabric route. Remove this entry once the box redeploys main and the OIDs reconcile.
accepted_divergences.web/living-anatomy.html: ahead=github, pending Forge redeploy of #433 (D5 repointed energy+anatomy Spaces; web/living-anatomy.html updated on main 2026-06-15). Live HF Space still serves the pre-D5 file. Remove once the HF Space redeploys main and OIDs reconcile.
accepted_divergences.static/3d/surfaces/fabric.js: ahead=github, pending Forge redeploy of PR #445/#446 (fabric COMPUTE FABRIC surface repointed to /api/a11oy/v1/compute-pool-hardened and corrected the primary-endpoint comment to describe honest TCP-probed reachability). Live HF Space still serves the pre-fix file. Remove this entry once the box redeploys main and the OIDs reconcile.
accepted_divergences.static/3d/surfaces/governance.js: ahead=github, pending Forge redeploy of the Governance live-wire PR (Governance/Assurance surface repointed from the 404 /assurance/* + /forge/ledger Forge-mesh routes to the LIVE restraint gate: /restraint/info + /restraint/evaluate + /honest, so the tab populates instead of reading OFFLINE). Live HF Space still serves the pre-fix file. Remove this entry once the box redeploys main and the OIDs reconcile.
